---
title: "Contact"
page-layout: article
toc: false
---

# Contact Us

We are happy to answer any questions regarding the **1st Hybrid National Seminar on Bioactive Molecules: From Characterization to Innovative Biotechnological Applications**.

Whether your inquiry concerns abstract submission, registration, accommodation, or the scientific program, please do not hesitate to contact us.

---

## Seminar Secretariat

**1st Hybrid National Seminar on Bioactive Molecules (NSBM 2026)**

**Concept and Application of Bioactive Molecules (CAMBio) Laboratory**

National Higher School of Biotechnology (ENSB) – Taoufik Khaznadar

Ali Mendjeli University Campus

Constantine, Algeria

---

## Contact Information

📧 **Email**

**nsbm@ensbiotech.edu.dz**

☎ **Telephone**

+213 5 50 84 74 87

🌐 **Website**

https://www.ensbiotech.edu.dz

---

## Office Hours

| Day | Hours |
|------|-------|
| Sunday – Thursday | 08:30 – 16:30 |
| Friday & Saturday | Closed |

---

## Contact the Organizing Committee

For inquiries regarding:

- Abstract submission
- Registration
- Payment
- Invitation letters
- Certificates
- Accommodation
- Visa support (international guests)
- Technical assistance

please contact the Seminar Secretariat by email.

---

## Social Media

Follow us for announcements and important updates.

- Facebook *(Coming Soon)*
- LinkedIn *(Coming Soon)*
- X (Twitter) *(Coming Soon)*

---

## Location

**National Higher School of Biotechnology (ENSB)**

Taoufik Khaznadar Campus

Ali Mendjeli

Constantine, Algeria

> A Google Maps location will be available before the seminar.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### How can I submit my abstract?

Please visit the **Call for Papers** page for submission guidelines and deadlines.

### How can I register?

Visit the **Registration** page to complete your registration.

### Who should I contact for technical issues?

Please send an email to **nsbm@ensbiotech.edu.dz** with the subject line **Technical Support**.

### Can I receive an invitation letter?

Yes. Registered participants may request an invitation letter from the Organizing Committee.

---

::: {.callout-important}

## We're Here to Help

The Organizing Committee is committed to making your participation as smooth and enjoyable as possible.

If you have any questions before or during the seminar, please don't hesitate to contact us.

We look forward to welcoming you to **NSBM 2026** in Constantine!

:::
